creator: hsu@iki.fi
text:
RELENG_6 comes with early version of ral driver.  It would seem that
there is support for plenty of new chip versions, including the one I
happen to have, in HEAD, which has not yet found its way into
RELENG_6.

Fix: 

Would it be possible to bump the HEAD driver into RELENG_6,
please.
How-To-Repeat: 
Insert a new minipci card with latest Ralink chip into 6.1 laptop or
embedded device.
